rules.description: Silakka58: CapsLock = tap Escape / hold Left Control
Silakka58: Z = tap Z / hold Left Option
Silakka58: Slash = tap / / hold Right Option
Silakka58: Right Command = tap Enter / hold Layer 2 (Mac has no inner right thumb key)
Silakka58: Space = tap Space / hold Layer 1 (tap-then-hold = real space hold)
Silakka58: Enter = tap Enter / hold Layer 2
Silakka58 Layer 1 (Space held): F-keys, symbols, brackets
Silakka58 Layer 2 (Enter held): nav, media, vim arrows
Tap Caps Lock for ESC or Hold for Control
